defaults
validation errors)

add contract tests for serialization of numpy/pandas objects across MCP boundaries
verify thread/process safety for StepwiseContext and model selection utilities under concurrent requests
include security hardening checks (input size limits
safe deserialization assumptions

cross_val_score
pipeline) and track regressions in CI
create versioned API compatibility policy for exposed MCP tools
add fallback behavior tests for environments missing optional deps (matplotlib/pytest) to ensure graceful degradation

success_factors: End-to-end workflow completed with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-based adapter strategy was feasible (import_feasibility 0.92) and low intrusiveness risk enabled non-invasive MCP wrapping.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level validation.
Repository structure was rich and analyzable (148 files discovered via zip fallback), enabling broad endpoint extraction.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (external analysis dependency), reducing enrichment quality but not blocking execution.
Original project test result is marked failed/empty despite '100%' coverage metadata, indicating test telemetry inconsistency rather than functional pipeline failure.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; imported via zip fallback, indicating robust fallback behavior though likely slower than direct VCS metadata parsing.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed successfully with medium complexity classification and broad module discovery; no LLM/DeepWiki call contribution to timing quality.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; MCP scaffold and adapter files created quickly with broad endpoint list.
node_performance.test_time: Plugin health checks passed, but original-project test stage produced contradictory signals (passed=false with no test files), limiting confidence.

resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate; only a small MCP output scaffold was generated, but generated size metrics were reported as 0 (likely instrumentation gap).
